title: Fix variables declared in fork after taskify
body:
This fixes usage of variables that are declared inside `fork` that are tasfied and in result made local to this new task.

Currently verilator gives:
``` 
%Error: Internal Error: t/t_var_in_fork.v:52:25: ../V3Task.cpp:126: No scope for var
                                               : ... note: In instance 't'
   52 |           automatic int my_auto_var = 0;
      |                         ^~~~~~~~~~~
```
